hero.headline: Secure your Bitcoin. Forever.
hero.subheadline: Most people will lose their Bitcoin to exchanges, hacks, or their own mistakes. This guide teaches you the ColdVault Method — a battle-tested 3-location multisig strategy so your Bitcoin survives everything.
hero.no_exchange: No exchange. No custodian. Only you.

problem.title: Most People Are One Event Away From Losing Everything
problem.subtitle: It's not just hackers. It's the boring, everyday ways Bitcoin disappears.

items.title: Exchange Collapse
items.desc: FTX, Mt. Gox, Celsius. Billions gone overnight. If it's on an exchange, it's not yours.

items.title: Single Point of Failure
items.desc: One hardware wallet. One seed phrase on paper. One house fire or burglary and it's all gone.

items.title: Lost to Time
items.desc: Hard drives die. Paper degrades. People forget. Your Bitcoin becomes dust without a robust system.

items.title: Phishing & Social Engineering
items.desc: One fake email, one fake support agent. If your setup depends on a single secret, attackers only need to find it once.

method.title: The ColdVault Method
method.subtitle: A 3-location multisig vault built to survive disasters, theft, and time — managed with Nunchuk.

locations.title: On Your Person
locations.desc: Hardware wallet in your daily carry. The first key, always with you.

locations.title: Home Safe
locations.desc: Second key in a fireproof home safe. Physically separate from the first.

locations.title: Bank Safe Deposit Box
locations.desc: Third key in a bank vault. ~$70/yr for peace of mind. Geographic separation from everything else.

method.nunchuk_desc: Nunchuk (nunchuk.io) is the only multisig wallet app built specifically for collaborative custody. Open-source, no cloud, no custodian — just you and your keys. The guide walks you through every step of setup.

whats_inside.title: What's Inside the Guide
whats_inside.subtitle: A practical, step-by-step PDF — no fluff, no theory.

chapters.title: Why Self-Custody
chapters.desc: The case for taking control — with real examples of what happens when you don't.

chapters.title: Choosing Your Hardware
chapters.desc: Hardware wallet comparison, what to buy, what to avoid, and where to buy safely.

chapters.title: Setting Up Nunchuk
chapters.desc: Step-by-step Nunchuk multisig setup. Screenshots included. Zero assumptions.

chapters.title: The 3-Location Strategy
chapters.desc: Exactly how to split and store your keys. Physical setup, labeling, and documentation.

chapters.title: Device Hardening
chapters.desc: Securing the devices involved. Air-gapping, OS choices, and threat modeling.

chapters.title: Inheritance & Recovery
chapters.desc: How your heirs access your Bitcoin if you can't. The plan you must have.

pricing.title: Get the Guide
pricing.subtitle: One-time purchase. Yours forever. No subscription.
pricing.card_desc: Immediate PDF download. Full 6-chapter guide. Covers hardware selection, Nunchuk setup, 3-location key storage, device hardening, and inheritance planning.
pricing.btc_note: BTCPay Server. No KYC. No account.

items.q: Do I need to be technical to use this guide?
items.a: No. The guide is written for anyone who owns Bitcoin but has never set up self-custody before. Every step has screenshots and plain-language explanations.

items.q: What is Nunchuk and why do you recommend it?
items.a: Nunchuk is a free, open-source multisig wallet app available on iOS, Android, Mac, Windows, and Linux. It's the only consumer app built from the ground up for multisig self-custody. No cloud, no custodian — your keys stay on your devices.

items.q: Which hardware wallets does this work with?
items.a: The guide covers the most popular options: Coldcard, Trezor, and Ledger. Nunchuk supports all major hardware wallets, so you can mix and match brands across your three locations.

items.q: What if I lose one of the three keys?
items.a: That's the beauty of multisig. A 2-of-3 setup means you need any two of the three keys to sign a transaction. Lose one? You still have full access and time to rotate keys.

items.q: Is the guide available in other languages?
items.a: Currently English only. Portuguese and Spanish editions are in progress.
Lifetime updates are included. When the guide is updated, you'll get the new version at the same download link.

footer.disclaimer: This guide is for educational purposes. Not financial advice.
